creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #8)
I'm not sure whether something changed with VCMI, but right now I am able to play without any problems. The reason may be that I switched to CURRENT, but I have no way to verify with 11-STABLE.

@amdmi3
Based on this, could this port be committed? It looks like it works nice on CURRENT.
